creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
I needed to add 'help' to USE_QT5, then it failed (on 10i, 11.1a, current) with

-- CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE: -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing
-- Configuring incomplete, errors occurred!
See also "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/openorienteering-mapper/work/.build/CMakeFiles/CMakeOutput.log".

See

https://people.freebsd.org/~pi/logs/graphics__openorienteering-mapper-10i-1523778568.txt
https://people.freebsd.org/~pi/logs/graphics__openorienteering-mapper-111-1523778568.txt
https://people.freebsd.org/~pi/logs/graphics__openorienteering-mapper-cur-1523778568.txt

and for the cmake output:

https://people.freebsd.org/~pi/logs/oo-mapper-CMakeOutput.log
